_comment: OFFERS FILE — Add, edit, or remove offers here. Set enabled:false to hide an offer without deleting it. Set announcementBar.enabled:false to hide the top bar.
heading: Special Offers
subheading: Exclusive deals on our most loved services — crafted for our valued clients.

announcementBar._note: Thin banner at the very top of the page. Set enabled:false to hide it.
announcementBar.text: ✨ New clients enjoy 10% off their first visit — walk in or call to book

offers.title: First Visit Offer
offers.subtitle: 10% off your first service
offers.description: Visiting Orchid for the first time? We'd love to welcome you with 10% off any single service — haircut, facial, spa, colour, or massage. No exclusions, no minimum spend.
offers.validity: For first-time clients only. One per person.

offers.title: Orchid Special Package
offers.subtitle: Our ultimate wellness experience
offers.description: Treat yourself to our all-inclusive Orchid Special Package — Body Massage, Body Scrub, Polishing, Wrap, and Facial. A complete head-to-toe ritual crafted to restore, refresh, and leave you glowing.
offers.validity: Subject to availability. Advance booking recommended.

offers.title: Tuesday Special
offers.subtitle: Your midweek wellness treat
offers.description: Every Tuesday at Orchid is your chance to enjoy special prices on Full Body Massage, De-Stress Ritual, and Body Wraps — the perfect midweek pick-me-up to keep you feeling your best.
offers.validity: Every Tuesday during regular business hours. Booking recommended.
